hero.headline: Your Strategic Partner in Accounting
hero.subheadline: BiH-based capacity for Austrian Steuerberater, German CFOs, and regional enterprises. MSFI-compliant. GDPR-ready. SLA-backed.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive financial and advisory services tailored for the BiH market and EU-based firms seeking nearshore capacity.

accounting.title: BiH Accounting
accounting.description: Full MSFI-compliant bookkeeping, financial statements, and regulatory reporting for entities operating under BiH law.

payroll.title: Payroll & HR
payroll.description: End-to-end payroll processing, labour law compliance, and HR administration tailored for the Bosnian market.

austrian.title: Austrian Outsourcing
austrian.description: White-label bookkeeping and client file management for Austrian Steuerberater and Wirtschaftsprüfer firms.

strategy.title: Business Strategy
strategy.description: ROI modelling, financial projections, and strategic planning for market entry and operational scaling.

feasibility.title: Feasibility Studies
feasibility.description: Pre-investment analysis, risk assessment, and viability reports for local and international investors.

grants.title: Grant Applications
grants.description: End-to-end support for EU structural funds, IPA, and international grant applications for BiH-registered entities.

whyUs.title: Why Bosnia Business Hub
whyUs.subtitle: A decade of institutional knowledge meets a lean, modern practice.

values.title: Deep Local Expertise
values.description: We navigate BiH's layered regulatory environment — Entity, Cantonal, and State-level — so you don't have to.

values.title: EU-Ready Infrastructure
values.description: GDPR-compliant data handling, encrypted file transfer, and multilingual reporting (DE/EN/BS).

values.title: White-Label Capacity
values.description: Invisible to your clients. Our work ships under your brand, with your formatting, and on your timeline.

values.title: Fixed SLA Commitments
values.description: Monthly reporting deadlines, dedicated account managers, and escalation paths — all contractually defined.

nearshoring.title: The Nearshoring Model
nearshoring.subtitle: A structured onboarding path that de-risks the engagement from day one.

intro.label: Step 01
intro.title: 30-Min Intro Call
intro.description: We align on your client portfolio, reporting standards, and data transfer protocols. No commitment required.

pilot.label: Step 02
pilot.title: 90-Day Pilot
pilot.description: We handle 3–5 client files under your supervision. Establish quality benchmarks and workflow integration.

scale.label: Step 03
scale.title: SLA-Backed Scaling
scale.description: Formalise the engagement with a signed SLA, dedicated team allocation, and monthly performance reviews.
